The 4-pack features fun random mix of fast-food designs тАУ chicken drumstick, burger, steak and hotdog. Each latex dog toy squeaky is lightweight, colourful and entertaining, making playtime fun for puppies, small dogs and medium breeds. Are these dog toys suitable for puppies from 8 weeks? Yes, theyтАЩre great as puppy toys from 8 weeks small dog. The soft rubber dog toys are gentle on teeth and gums, safe for teething pups, and help introduce healthy chewing habits while keeping your pooch entertained and active. What dog breeds are these squeaky toys ideal for? Perfect for small breeds like Chihuahuas, Dachshunds and Yorkies, plus medium dogs including Beagles, French Bulldogs and Cocker Spaniels. For large dogs such as Labradors or German Shepherds, pair with durable indestructible chews. How do these toys help reduce boredom and destructive behaviour? Each squeaky dog toy doubles as a dog enrichment toy, keeping your furry friend busy, stimulated and out of mischief. TheyтАЩre boredom-busters that encourage chasing, chewing and interactive play while helping to minimise destructive habits. Are these rubber dog chews durable and safe for daily play? Made from natural latex, these rubber dog toys are strong for everyday chewing but soft on teeth. TheyтАЩre durable dog toys for pups and active chewers, though not indestructible. Always supervise play and replace if any wear is visible.
